How SwapSpace Provides Information About Tokens: Anyswap (ANY) Example

At SwapSpace, we provide detailed insights into various tokens to help users make informed decisions. Here's an example of how we present information about Anyswap (ANY) to help you understand its key features, use cases, and more!

Anyswap (ANY) is a decentralized cross-chain swap protocol designed to facilitate seamless asset exchanges across different blockchain networks. It was launched in July 2020 by the Anyswap team, which introduced innovative multichain interoperability features to the DeFi ecosystem.

Up-to-date Anyswap news

  • November 2024: ANY token integration with Avalanche's subnets to enhance scalability and interoperability​.
  • October 2024: Anyswap supports additional ERC-20 and BEP-20 tokens, expanding trading pairs​.
  • September 2024: Improved UI for better user experience on Anyswap DEX​.
  • August 2024: Anyswap introduces advanced liquidity mining rewards for liquidity providers​.
  • July 2024: Cross-chain bridge updates with faster transaction speeds and lower fees.​

Tokenomics of ANY

Anyswap (ANY) operates on multiple blockchain networks, including Ethereum and Binance Smart Chain. Its primary goal is to enable decentralized cross-chain asset swaps and provide liquidity for DeFi protocols. ANY serves as a utility token within the Anyswap ecosystem, used for governance, fee reductions, and staking rewards. The total supply of ANY tokens is capped at 100 million.

Key features of Anyswap (ANY)

Anyswap’s standout features are tailored for decentralized and efficient cross-chain transactions:

  • Multichain compatibility: Enables swaps across multiple blockchain networks, fostering interoperability.
  • Decentralized liquidity pools: Allows users to provide liquidity and earn rewards without intermediaries.
  • Secure bridge technology: Safeguards transactions with robust cryptographic mechanisms.
  • Low transaction fees: Optimized smart contracts reduce costs, making swaps more accessible.

Use cases for Anyswap (ANY)

  • Swapping assets across blockchain ecosystems.
  • Providing liquidity to decentralized pools for rewards.
  • Governance participation by voting on protocol updates.
  • Reducing transaction costs via fee discounts on the Anyswap platform.

The average fees on the Anyswap Network

Transaction fees on Anyswap average between $1 to $5, depending on network congestion. This is a competitive rate for multichain decentralized exchanges.

The ANY token wallets

  • Metamask: A widely used Ethereum wallet for storing and managing ANY tokens.
  • Trust Wallet: Offers secure storage and access to Anyswap’s ecosystem.
  • Coin98 Wallet: Supports multichain transactions and the ANY token.
  • TokenPocket: Enables seamless interaction with Anyswap’s cross-chain features.
  • Math Wallet: Provides diverse blockchain integrations, including ANY token compatibility.

You can now trade Anyswap (ANY) effortlessly on SwapSpace. With its user-friendly interface and competitive rates, SwapSpace makes exchanging Anyswap (ANY) a breeze. Check the Anyswap (ANY) price chart, use the currency converter, and join the decentralized finance revolution today!

A simple way to exchange Anyswap here at SwapSpace

Step 1

Choose a pair

To help you make a decision about exchanging your ANY, we gathered some cold hard numbers: ANY price chart and other stats, such as ANY market cap.

Step 2

Select the best rate

You choose the rate – we do the magic! Pick up the exchange service by the rate which meets your requirements. Make sure you are okay with the selected service network fee and privacy policy: some of them require you to pass the AML/KYC procedure.

Step 3

Transfer funds

Send the exact amount to the address provided and receive the crypto in your wallet within minutes. Don’t have a wallet yet? Our support will recommend a good one!

Step 4

Receive your coins

You’ll get your coins in a few minutes! The exact time is a subject of various parameters such as blockchain network workload, transaction volume, our partners’ processing speed, etc. Concerned about your transaction? Check the swap tracker or feel free to contact the support: support@swapspace.co.
